test-case.name: MathfPerlinNoise_KnownValues
test-case.output: Mathf.PerlinNoise(0, 0) = 0.4652731 Mathf.PerlinNoise(1, 1) = 0.4652731 Mathf.PerlinNoise(10.5, 20.3) = 0.549199 Mathf.PerlinNoise(100.123, 200.456) = 0.7334924 Saving results to: C:\Users\dangreen\projects\valheim\worldzones\tests\unity\TestResults-Cleanup.xml
